mapper.select:
select CARGOKEY, ID, F_CARGOKEY, O_CARGOKEY, CARGOKEY_TYPE, CARGO_ORI, DGRQ_S, DGRQ_E, ZYGSDM, HTID, ZYWTRID, ZYWTR, TZHDID, HC, ZHWCHM, CB, HWDM, HWMCH, HW_FLAG, HQCYRID, HQCYR, KHFS, SHL as cargokeyshl, TGS, SUM_JS, SUM_KS, KFS, XDS, SYS, KHRQ, FLAG, NOTE, CREATEBY, CREATEBYID, CREATEON, CREATE_GSID, CREATE_GSMCH, CREATE_BMID, CREATE_BMMCH, CREATE_GWID, CREATE_GWMCH, MODIFYBY, MODIFYBYID, MODIFYON, HTH_LSH, FLAG_ZF, FZH, HZID, HZ, BY1, BY2, BY3, BY4, BY5, BY6, BY7, BY8, BY9, BY10, EJZYGSDM, CHBJHH, ZXHTID, DLDM, DLMCH, ZHLDM, ZHLMCH from VW_SHW_CARGOINFO v where 1=1
and zygsdm =#{hgfxSearchReqVo.zygsdm}
and v.ZHWCHM like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.zhwchm}||'%'
and v.HWMCH like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.hwmch}||'%'
and v.ZYWTR like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.zywtr}||'%'
and v.HZ like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.hz}||'%'
and v.HQCYR like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.hqcyr}||'%'
and v.HTH_LSH like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.hthLsh}||'%'
and v.HTH like'%'||#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.hth}||'%'
and v.DGRQ_S>= to_date(#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.dgrqSStartTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and v.DGRQ_S <= to_date(#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.dgrqSEndTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and v.DGRQ_E>= to_date(#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.dgrqEStartTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and v.DGRQ_E <= to_date(#{cargoInfoSearchReqVo.dgrqEEndTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
AND v.FLAG='是'
AND v.FLAG='否'
and (v.ZYWTR like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%' or v.HQCYR like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%' or v.HZ like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%' or v.HTH_LSH like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%' or v.ZHWCHM like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%' or v.HWMCH like '%'||#{params.mch}||'%')
order by v.DGRQ_E desc nulls last,v.CREATEON desc,v.CARGOKEY desc

select CARGOKEY, ID, F_CARGOKEY, O_CARGOKEY, CARGOKEY_TYPE, CARGO_ORI, DGRQ_S, DGRQ_E, ZYGSDM, HTID, ZYWTRID, ZYWTR, TZHDID, HC, ZHWCHM, CB, HWDM, HWMCH, HW_FLAG, HQCYRID, HQCYR, KHFS, SHL as cargokeyshl, TGS, SUM_JS, SUM_KS, KFS, XDS, SYS, KHRQ, FLAG, FLAG_ZF, FZH, HZID, HZ, BY1, BY2, BY3, BY4, BY5, BY6, BY7, BY8, BY9, BY10, EJZYGSDM, CHBJHH, ZXHTID, DLDM, DLMCH, ZHLDM, ZHLMCH from VW_SHW_CARGOINFO a where a.cargokey=#{cargokey}

select ID,CARGOKEY,CARGOKEY_FROM,CARGOKEY_TO,LB,TYPE,SHL as cdshl,DGRQ,TZHDID,JHS, SHL_JL,JJS,CHJ,NOTE,JHSBRID,GQ,KFS,XDS,SYS,CREATEBY,CREATEBYID,CREATEON,CREATE_GSID, CREATE_GSMCH,CREATE_BMID,CREATE_BMMCH,CREATE_GWID,CREATE_GWMCH,status from BT_SHW_CARGOINFO_DETAIL where cargokey=#{cargokey} order by id desc
select cargokey,lb,type,sum(shl) as sumshl from BT_SHW_CARGOINFO_DETAIL where CARGOKEY = #{cargokey} and (lb = '加数' or lb = '扣数') group by cargokey,lb,type
select max(CUSTOMERID) zywtrid,max(FULL_NAME) zywtr from VW_BT_CUSTOMER_MASTER where CUSTOMERID =#{zywtrid}
SELECT SUM (KC.KCZHL) kc FROM BT_SHW_CARGOINFO INFO,BT_YARD_TJBH TJBH,BT_YARD_HWKCZH KC WHERE INFO.CARGOKEY=TJBH.CARGOKEY AND TJBH.TJBH=KC.TJBH and INFO.CARGOKEY =#{CARGOKEY}
SELECT NVL(SUM(JHS),0)as jhglshgl FROM BT_SHW_CARGOINFO_DETAIL WHERE LB='通知单' AND TYPE='公路疏港' AND CARGOKEY =#{CARGOKEY}
SELECT NVL(SUM(JHS),0) as jhtlshgl FROM BT_SHW_CARGOINFO_DETAIL WHERE LB='通知单' AND TYPE='铁路疏港' AND CARGOKEY =#{CARGOKEY}
SELECT NVL(SUM(JHS),0) as jhzhchl FROM BT_SHW_CARGOINFO_DETAIL WHERE LB='通知单' AND TYPE='船舶装船' AND CARGOKEY=#{CARGOKEY}
